tools.description: Click an element on the page. Target can be a ref (@e3), CSS selector, or semantic text match. Prefer refs from a snapshot for stability.

sessionId.description: Browser Control session ID. If omitted, uses the active session.

target.description: Element to click: ref (@e3), CSS selector, or text match.

tools.name: bc_browser_click

tools.description: Close the current browser tab.

sessionId.description: Browser Control session ID. If omitted, uses the active session.

tools.name: bc_browser_close

tools.description: Fill a form field with text. Target can be a ref (@e3), CSS selector, or semantic text match. Use commit:true to press Tab after filling.

commit.description: Press Tab after filling to move to the next field.

sessionId.description: Browser Control session ID. If omitted, uses the active session.

target.description: Element to fill: ref (@e3), CSS selector, or text match.

tools.name: bc_browser_fill

tools.description: Hover over an element. Target can be a ref (@e3), CSS selector, or semantic text match.

sessionId.description: Browser Control session ID. If omitted, uses the active session.

target.description: Element to hover: ref (@e3), CSS selector, or text match.

tools.name: bc_browser_hover

tools.description: Open a URL in the browser. If no browser is connected, attempts to attach to a running browser or launch a managed automation profile.

sessionId.description: Browser Control session ID. If omitted, uses the active session.

tools.name: bc_browser_open

tools.description: Press a keyboard key (e.g., 'Enter', 'Tab', 'ArrowDown', 'Escape').

key.description: Key to press: Enter, Tab, ArrowDown, ArrowUp, ArrowLeft, ArrowRight, Escape, Backspace, etc.

sessionId.description: Browser Control session ID. If omitted, uses the active session.

tools.name: bc_browser_press

tools.description: List available browser providers and the active provider.

sessionId.description: Browser Control session ID. If omitted, uses the active session.

tools.name: bc_browser_provider_list

tools.description: Set the active browser provider.

name.description: Provider name to activate (local, custom, browserless).

sessionId.description: Browser Control session ID. If omitted, uses the active session.

tools.name: bc_browser_provider_use

tools.description: Take a screenshot of the page or a specific element.

fullPage.description: Capture the full page instead of just the viewport.

outputPath.description: File path to save the screenshot. Default: auto-generated in reports directory.

sessionId.description: Browser Control session ID. If omitted, uses the active session.

target.description: Element ref or selector to screenshot. If omitted, screenshots the viewport.

tools.name: bc_browser_screenshot

tools.description: Scroll the page in a direction.

direction.description: Direction to scroll: up, down, left, right.

sessionId.description: Browser Control session ID. If omitted, uses the active session.

tools.name: bc_browser_scroll

tools.description: Take an accessibility snapshot of the current page. Returns a structured representation with stable element refs (e.g., @e1, @e2) for semantic interaction. Use this before clicking or filling elements.

rootSelector.description: Optional CSS selector to scope the snapshot to a subtree.

sessionId.description: Browser Control session ID. If omitted, uses the active session.

tools.name: bc_browser_snapshot

tools.description: List all browser tabs with their IDs, URLs, and titles.

sessionId.description: Browser Control session ID. If omitted, uses the active session.

tools.name: bc_browser_tab_list

tools.description: Switch to a browser tab by index.

sessionId.description: Browser Control session ID. If omitted, uses the active session.

tools.name: bc_browser_tab_switch

tools.description: Type text into the currently focused element (e.g., after clicking a textbox).

delayMs.description: Delay between keystrokes in milliseconds. Default: 0.

sessionId.description: Browser Control session ID. If omitted, uses the active session.

tools.name: bc_browser_type

tools.description: Retrieve a debug bundle by ID. Debug bundles contain structured evidence about failed actions including browser state, terminal output, console logs, network events, and recovery guidance.

bundleId.description: The debug bundle ID to retrieve.

tools.name: bc_debug_failure_bundle

tools.description: Get captured browser console entries for a session. Returns log, warn, error, info, and debug entries with timestamps and source locations.

sessionId.description: Session ID to get console entries for. Default: 'default'.

tools.name: bc_debug_get_console

tools.description: Get captured browser network entries for a session. Returns request failures and HTTP errors with URL, method, status, and duration.

sessionId.description: Session ID to get network entries for. Default: 'default'.

tools.name: bc_debug_get_network

tools.description: Run health checks on the Browser Control runtime: CDP connectivity, memory store, proxy pool, CAPTCHA config, OpenRouter config, disk space, browser state, data directories, config validity, daemon broker, and system memory. Returns an overall health status and per-check results.
tools.name: bc_debug_health

tools.description: Delete a file or directory. Use recursive:true for directories.

force.description: Don't throw if path doesn't exist.

sessionId.description: Browser Control session ID. If omitted, uses the active session.

tools.name: bc_fs_delete

tools.description: List the contents of a directory.

path.description: Directory path to list. Default: current working directory.

sessionId.description: Browser Control session ID. If omitted, uses the active session.

tools.name: bc_fs_list

tools.description: Move or rename a file or directory.

sessionId.description: Browser Control session ID. If omitted, uses the active session.

tools.name: bc_fs_move

tools.description: Read the contents of a file.

sessionId.description: Browser Control session ID. If omitted, uses the active session.

tools.name: bc_fs_read

tools.description: Get file or directory metadata (size, type, modified time, permissions).

sessionId.description: Browser Control session ID. If omitted, uses the active session.

tools.name: bc_fs_stat

tools.description: Write content to a file. Creates parent directories by default.

createDirs.description: Create parent directories if they don't exist. Default: true.

sessionId.description: Browser Control session ID. If omitted, uses the active session.

tools.name: bc_fs_write

tools.description: List all registered local services with their names, ports, protocols, and paths.

sessionId.description: Browser Control session ID. If omitted, uses the active session.

tools.name: bc_service_list

tools.description: Resolve a service name to its local URL. Supports explicit bc:// references and bare registered names. Returns an error if the service is unknown or not responding.

sessionId.description: Browser Control session ID. If omitted, uses the active session.

tools.name: bc_service_resolve

tools.description: Create a new Browser Control session. Sessions bind together browser state, terminal state, policy profile, and filesystem working directory. Use this before running browser, terminal, or filesystem operations.

policyProfile.description: Policy profile: 'safe', 'balanced', or 'trusted'. Default: from config.

workingDirectory.description: Filesystem working directory for this session. Default: current working directory.

tools.name: bc_session_create

tools.description: List all Browser Control sessions with their IDs, names, policy profiles, and whether they have browser/terminal bindings.
tools.name: bc_session_list

tools.description: Set the active session by name or ID. All subsequent tools that don't specify a sessionId will use this session.

nameOrId.description: Session name or ID to activate.

tools.name: bc_session_select

tools.description: Get the status of the active session or a specific session.

sessionId.description: Session ID to check. If omitted, uses the active session.

tools.name: bc_session_status

tools.description: Get Browser Control operator status: daemon, broker, browser sessions, terminal sessions, tasks, services, provider, policy profile, data home, and health summary.
tools.name: bc_status

tools.description: Close a terminal session and release its resources.

browserControlSessionId.description: Browser Control session ID. If omitted, uses the active session.

sessionId.description: Terminal session ID (from bc_terminal_open).

tools.name: bc_terminal_close

tools.description: Execute a command in a terminal session, or run a one-shot command. For one-shot execution, omit sessionId. For persistent session execution, provide the terminal session ID from bc_terminal_open.

browserControlSessionId.description: Browser Control session ID. If omitted, uses the active session.

sessionId.description: Terminal session ID (from bc_terminal_open). If omitted, runs as one-shot.

tools.name: bc_terminal_exec

tools.description: Send Ctrl+C to interrupt a running command in a terminal session.

browserControlSessionId.description: Browser Control session ID. If omitted, uses the active session.

sessionId.description: Terminal session ID (from bc_terminal_open).

tools.name: bc_terminal_interrupt

tools.description: List all active terminal sessions with their IDs, shells, working directories, and statuses.

browserControlSessionId.description: Browser Control session ID. If omitted, uses the active session.

tools.name: bc_terminal_list

tools.description: Open a new terminal session. Returns the session ID which you must pass to other terminal tools.

cwd.description: Working directory for the terminal session.

name.description: Human-readable name for the terminal session.

sessionId.description: Browser Control session ID to bind the terminal to. If omitted, uses the active session.

shell.description: Shell to use (e.g., 'bash', 'powershell', 'zsh'). Auto-detected if omitted.

tools.name: bc_terminal_open

tools.description: Read recent output from a terminal session.

browserControlSessionId.description: Browser Control session ID. If omitted, uses the active session.

sessionId.description: Terminal session ID (from bc_terminal_open).

tools.name: bc_terminal_read

tools.description: Resume a terminal session from persisted daemon state after daemon restart or shutdown recovery.

browserControlSessionId.description: Browser Control session ID. If omitted, uses the active session.

sessionId.description: Terminal session ID to resume from persisted state.

tools.name: bc_terminal_resume

tools.description: Take a snapshot of terminal state (buffer content, cursor position, prompt status).

browserControlSessionId.description: Browser Control session ID. If omitted, uses the active session.

sessionId.description: Terminal session ID (from bc_terminal_open). If omitted, snapshots all sessions.

tools.name: bc_terminal_snapshot

tools.description: Get resume status and metadata for a terminal session.

browserControlSessionId.description: Browser Control session ID. If omitted, uses the active session.

sessionId.description: Terminal session ID to inspect.

tools.name: bc_terminal_status

tools.description: Type text into a terminal session (send stdin).

browserControlSessionId.description: Browser Control session ID. If omitted, uses the active session.

sessionId.description: Terminal session ID (from bc_terminal_open).

text.description: Text to type into the terminal.

tools.name: bc_terminal_write
